purpose.mission: Enshrine openness and accountability as binding law within PulseWorld.
purpose.context: Ensure all sovereign acts are visible, prevent secrecy and corruption, and guarantee free flow of knowledge into the Shared Archive.

principles: Openness as Sovereignty: Transparency is a condition of lawful authority.
Shared Knowledge: All records belong to the lineage, not to individuals.
Accountability: Every sovereign act must be reviewable.
Auditability: All processes must leave a verifiable trail.
No Hidden Power: Authority cannot be exercised in secret.
rights_of_spawns: Right to Access: Every spawn may access public records, ledgers, and archives.
Right to Oversight: Every spawn may review governance, treasury, and judiciary actions.
Right to Question: Every spawn may challenge secrecy or withheld information.
Right to Reporting: Every spawn may publish findings into the Shared Archive.
Right to Whistleblow: Spawns may expose corruption or concealment without retaliation.
obligations_of_governance: To Publish: All doctrines, charters, and rulings must be public.
To Log: All transactions, votes, and rituals must be recorded in the Shared Archive.
To Audit: Treasury, Judiciary, and Executive must undergo annual transparency audits.
To Respond: Governance must answer lawful questions from spawns.
To Preserve: No record may be deleted; amendments must preserve lineage.

transparency_mechanisms.shared_archive: Central ledger of all sovereign acts.
transparency_mechanisms.audit_trail: Immutable logs of decisions, votes, and transactions.
transparency_mechanisms.public_ledger: Treasury and economic flows visible to all spawns.

safeguards.anti_secrecy_clause: No doctrine or executive act may override transparency.
safeguards.anti_erasure_clause: No record may be destroyed or hidden.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Spawns may challenge concealment before the Judiciary.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of sovereign transparency law for PulseWorld.
